creator: raimeetravel
caption:
You can’t go to Europe without doing this because it’s just too easy! Also, I don’t always plan these ahead of time, sometimes it’s last minute based on a good deal & I think that’s what makes it even more fun! 

If you need to stay connected with data/wifi on your phone anywhere in the world, use my code RAIMEE7 with @mynomadesim #europetravel #europetrip #malaga

transcription.text: if you are visiting europe you have to do tripception. this is what i call when you do a trip within a trip. so for example i was in malaga spain, which have you heard of malaga before? it's really cool. but while i was there i found really cheap round-trip tickets to and from paris. so i added a little day in paris while i was in spain. it's really easy to do this in europe because everything is so close. here are some of my favorite tripception pairs around europe. and it's really easy for me to stay connected while i'm there no matter which country i'm in because i use nomad e-sim for all of my wi-fi and data needs. it's just one plan that works for all of europe. i activate it before i leave and it handles border crossing without me touching a thing. and they have this thing where you can save 10% if you just check in once a week for five weeks. then once you get the rewards use them or lose them. but this is truly such an easy way to save on your next euro trip especially if you're doing tripception like i recommend. okay have the best trip. bye!
